svg.title: Service to service communication with and without service mesh
svg.desc: Two side-by-side diagrams showing how two microservices communicate directly via ClusterIP without a service mesh, versus with Istio where Envoy sidecar proxies intercept all traffic between pods
svg.text: ClusterIP Service = phone directory that finds the pod address
Without mesh: app code talks directly to app code
With mesh: Envoy intercepts all traffic transparently
App code never changes — the sidecar handles everything
